violations.text: Various food items in the prep units were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The gasket at the pizza/salad prep unit was observed to be frayed. Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The following areas were observed with old rodent droppings: 1) Behind the kitchen prep units 2) Behind the equipment in the bar area The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pest control reports reviewed at time of inspection. Pest control services establishment 2x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The walls in the bar area is in poor repair (exposed holes in the walls). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
